campus: Rome — Sant'Andrea Hospital area (classes mainly in the Faculty building next to Azienda Ospedaliera Sant'Andrea, some on the Sapienza campus)
admission_test_type: Programme admission test carried out in English
application_platform: Sapienza admission test registration (Infostud); Universitaly pre-enrolment and MoveIN for non-EU visa-required applicants [uncertain]
access_quota_non_eu: Reserved places for non-EU residing abroad set by the Call; vacant non-EU places are reallocated to the EU / non-EU-resident-in-Italy ranking. Specific number [uncertain].
places_and_foreign_contingent: Health-professions restricted-access programme (numero programmato). Total places and non-EU contingent for 2026/2027 [uncertain].

academic_requirements.secondary_school_diploma: A secondary-school diploma giving access to higher education is required.
academic_requirements.test_requirement: Admission is based on an entrance exam carried out in English; a separate English proficiency exam is not required for admission.
academic_requirements.non_eu_requirements: Non-EU applicants residing abroad must meet the Sapienza academic requirements (MoveIN 2026-2027), pre-enrol on Universitaly and obtain a study visa. [uncertain]

country_specific_eligibility: Country-specific qualification and minimum schooling requirements per the Sapienza academic requirements document (MoveIN 2026-2027). [uncertain]

language_requirements.level: Programme taught in English; admission test carried out in English.
language_requirements.assessment: An English proficiency certificate is not required for admission; English ability is assessed via the English-language entrance exam.
language_requirements.note: B2-level English recommended; a certificate or university interview may be required at enrolment for some routes. [uncertain]

language_submission_timing: Assessed via the English entrance exam at admission; certificate route (if any) by enrolment. [uncertain]
italian_language_requirement: Italian proficiency is practically important for clinical internships in Italian hospitals. [uncertain]
application_deadline_eu: EU and equivalent candidates (no visa required): on or before 31 July 2026; entrance-exam registration deadlines apply. [uncertain on exact dates]
application_deadline_non_eu: Non-EU residing abroad (visa-required): MoveIN online pre-selection by 15 May 2026; Universitaly pre-enrolment by 30 June 2026. [uncertain on exact dates]
application_fee: €30 per application (standard Sapienza fee; max 2 applications per intake). [uncertain]
visa_preenrolment_deadline: Universitaly pre-enrolment by 30 June 2026 for non-EU visa-required applicants (compulsory to obtain a study visa).
required_documents: Secondary-school diploma / qualification giving access to higher education
Entrance-exam registration (no separate English certificate required for admission)
For non-EU residing abroad: documents required by MoveIN pre-selection and Universitaly pre-enrolment (visa)
document_translation_authentication: Foreign qualifications typically require Declaration of Value or CIMEA Statement of Comparability plus translation/legalisation. [uncertain]

entry_exam_or_test.type: Programme-specific entrance exam carried out in English
entry_exam_or_test.note: Access is via the admission test; English proficiency exams are not required for admission.
entry_exam_or_test.registration: Register for the admission test and pay the fee by the Call deadlines. [uncertain on dates]

test_variant_and_session: English-language entrance exam; specific 2026-2027 session date, mode and registration window [uncertain].
test_score_conversion_or_threshold: Ranking-based admission on the entrance-exam score; admission cutoff depends on ranking. [uncertain]

source_quotes.quote: The Nursing degree ... is a 3-year Bachelor's degree taught in the English language ... 180 CFU.
Admission to the course is based on an entrance exam carried out in English. English proficiency exams are not required for admission.
the practical internship carried out in the Sant'Andrea Hospital. Classes will be carried out mainly in the Faculty building next to Azienda Ospedale Sant'Andrea and some on the Sapienza campus.
